file_summary: This file implements a parser for detecting and processing programming language symbols from source files.

symbols.name: symbolStoplist
symbols.summary: A set of common variable names that should be ignored during symbol detection.

symbols.name: registry
symbols.summary: Maps file extensions to language definitions used for parsing.

symbols.name: plainTextNames
symbols.summary: A set of filenames that are considered plain text files.

symbols.name: plainTextExts
symbols.summary: A set of file extensions that are considered plain text files.

symbols.name: raw
symbols.summary: A list of raw entries extracted from the source file.

symbols.name: nameNode
symbols.summary: Represents the syntax tree node for a symbol's name and body.

symbols.name: bodyNode
symbols.summary: Represents the syntax tree node for a symbol's name and body.

symbols.name: symbols
symbols.summary: A list of detected symbols from the source file.

symbols.name: chunkSize
symbols.summary: Defines the size of chunks used for processing large files.

symbols.name: overlap
symbols.summary: Defines the amount of overlap between chunks when processing large files.

symbols.name: src
symbols.summary: Reads the contents of a file into memory for parsing.

symbols.name: lang
symbols.summary: Detects the programming language of a file based on its path and extension.

symbols.name: langName
symbols.summary: The name of the detected programming language for a file.

symbols.name: tree
symbols.summary: Parses the source code into a syntax tree using the Sitter library.

symbols.name: ext
symbols.summary: Extracts and normalizes the file extension from a path.

symbols.name: def
symbols.summary: Looks up the language definition for a given file extension.

symbols.name: base
symbols.summary: Extracts and normalizes the base name of a file from its path.

symbols.name: highPriority
symbols.summary: A set of high-priority symbol names that should be processed first.

symbols.name: highKinds
symbols.summary: A set of high-priority symbol kinds that should be processed first.

symbols.name: tsQuery
symbols.summary: Creates a new Tree-sitter query for extracting symbols from the syntax tree.

symbols.name: cursor
symbols.summary: Creates a new Tree-sitter query cursor for iterating over matches.

symbols.name: match
symbols.summary: Retrieves the next match from the query cursor.

symbols.name: capName
symbols.summary: Gets the capture name for a given capture index in the query.

symbols.name: name
symbols.summary: Extracts the content of a symbol's name from the source code.

symbols.name: body
symbols.summary: Extracts the content of a symbol's body from the source code.
